SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JANINE MA'CHEA EVANS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS THE ARANDA HOTEL AND CONRAD HOUSE ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, JANINE MA'CHEA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE ARANDA HOTEL, LLC CONARD HOUSE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
